title: PocketGPS
description: This mod adds a "PocketGPS" item and changes minimap mods to only display if it is in the player's inventory or Curios/Trinkets/Accessories slot. Useful if you want to limit minimap usage in the early game.
body:
# PocketGPS

This mod adds a "PocketGPS" item and changes minimap mods to only display if it is in the player's inventory or Curios/Trinkets/Accessories slot. Useful if you want to limit minimap usage in the early game.

There is also a config option to require the GPS be charged in order to display the map. The drain rate and capacity can also be changed in the config if enabled. 

Includes support for the following minimaps currently:
- Xaero's Minimap / WorldMap
- FTB Chunks
- JourneyMap


### Other Links:
* [Disable PocketGPS Curios/Trinkets/Accessories Slot] datapack

[Disable PocketGPS Curios/Trinkets/Accessories Slot]: https://modrinth.com/datapack/disable-pocketgps-slot
